title: Home Screen - Both earbuds are disconnected
scenario: Home Screen UI shows greyed out earbud fields and disconnected status when both earbuds are placed in the case on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the Poly Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 60, or Voyager Free 20 earbuds are connected to the app.
3. Place both earbuds into the charging case.
4. Observe the Home screen of the app.
5. Check the battery status fields for 'Left', 'Right', and 'Case'.
7. Check the earbud images displayed on the Home screen.
expected: The 'Left', 'Right', and 'Case' fields are greyed out and show only the '%' symbol (no exact percentage). The 'Status' field shows 'disconnected' with a red indicator. The earbud images are greyed out.
